subject: Fermi GBM trigger 466602792/151015495 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
466602792/151015495 at 11:53:08.13 UT on 15 October 2015,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to particle activity."
